_description: Sample: Student-Friendly Copilot Answer — Personalized revision recommendation, NEET 2025

request.question: I have 30 days left for NEET. I'm weak in Genetics and average in Human Physiology. What should I do first?

response.question: I have 30 days left for NEET. I'm weak in Genetics and average in Human Physiology. What should I do first?
response.answer:
Great question — and the good news is: you're focusing on exactly the right chapters.

🔬 WHY GENETICS MUST COME FIRST:
Genetics and Evolution is the #1 predicted chapter for NEET 2025. The PRAJNA engine gives it a 92% appearance probability — that's basically guaranteed. Here's your 30-day Genetics emergency plan:

📅 DAYS 1–7: Mendelian Genetics (12h total)
• Day 1–2: Mendel's Laws — Monohybrid and Dihybrid crosses (with actual ratio tables)
• Day 3–4: Chromosomal Theory of Inheritance + sex-linked traits
• Day 5–6: Molecular Basis of Inheritance — DNA replication, transcription
• Day 7: Solve 50 NEET PYQs on Genetics (2015–2024)

📅 DAYS 8–14: Human Physiology (10h)
Since you're already average here, you need a boost not a restart:
• Day 8–9: Digestion — enzyme table, site of absorption (direct MCQ fodder)
• Day 10–11: Neural Control — resting potential, synaptic transmission
• Day 12: Excretion — nephron structure, counter-current mechanism
• Day 13–14: Solve 40 PYQs on Human Physiology

📅 DAYS 15–21: Remaining Biology + Chemistry revision
📅 DAYS 22–28: Full-length mock tests (3 complete NEET papers)
📅 DAYS 29–30: Only micro-topic drilling on YOUR weakest points from mocks

⚠️ DO NOT SKIP:
• Mutations (Genetics) — appearing more frequently in recent years
• Hardy-Weinberg formula problems — 1–2 questions, easily learnable
• Photosynthesis Light Reactions — 3rd highest Biology priority

💡 MARKS IMPACT: If you improve Genetics from weak → strong, you can recover 10–14 marks. Human Physiology from average → strong = 6–8 marks. That's potentially 16–22 extra marks in 30 days.

insights.title: Genetics is your #1 priority — 92% appearance probability
insights.claim: Genetics and Evolution is the highest-importance NEET chapter. With 30 days remaining, it should receive your first 7 days.
insights.recommended_action: Start with Mendelian crosses today. Solve PYQs from 2015–2024 after each sub-topic.

sources.detail: Genetics: importance=0.92, confidence=0.88. Human Physiology: importance=0.85, confidence=0.87
Genetics appeared 9/10 years. Human Physiology appeared 10/10 years.
